name_it: Saints Cyril, monk, and Methodius, bishop
name_en: Saints Cyril, monk, and Methodius, bishop
name_es: Saints Cyril, monk, and Methodius, bishop
name_pt: Saints Cyril, monk, and Methodius, bishop
bio_en: Cyril and Methodius were brothers, Byzantine Christian theologians and missionaries. For their work evangelizing the Slavs, they are known as the "Apostles to the Slavs".
bio_it: Cyril and Methodius were brothers, Byzantine Christian theologians and missionaries. For their work evangelizing the Slavs, they are known as the "Apostles to the Slavs".
bio_es: Cyril and Methodius were brothers, Byzantine Christian theologians and missionaries. For their work evangelizing the Slavs, they are known as the "Apostles to the Slavs".
bio_pt: Cyril and Methodius were brothers, Byzantine Christian theologians and missionaries. For their work evangelizing the Slavs, they are known as the "Apostles to the Slavs".
